settings.title: REVEAL THE POWER OF LIGHT THERAPY
settings.content: LED (Light Emitting Diode) Therapy is a non-invasive treatment that uses light wavelengths to penetrate the skin, stimulating cellular activity and ATP production. This boosts healing, rejuvenation, and skin repair, addressing concerns like aging and acne. Backed by science, our devices target dermal and epidermal layers for effective results.

settings.heading: Blue light (415nm)
settings.description: Blue light at 415nm targets the epidermis, eliminating acne-causing bacteria while reducing inflammation and excess oil. In SuperStar Pimple Patches, this powerful light therapy helps clear breakouts and support healthier, blemish-free skin.

settings.heading: Amber light (605nm)
settings.description: Amber light at 605nm soothes the skin, boosts circulation, and enhances healing by stimulating collagen and elastin production. In LushLips Transformation, it targets the lips to reduce dryness, improve tone, and restore a naturally plump, healthy look.

settings.heading: Red light (630nm)
settings.description: Red light at 630nm energizes skin cells, boosts collagen, and enhances circulation for faster healing and improved texture. Featured in all the creations of Metamorphosis collection: LushLips Transformation, SuperStar Pimple Patches, and MagicMoon Eye Evolution, it helps plump lips, calm blemishes, and refresh the delicate eye area for a healthier, radiant look.

settings.heading: Deep Red Light (660nm)
settings.description: Penetrating the skin at an optimal depth, 660nm Deep Red light boosts cellular activity, collagen production, and circulation—enhancing elasticity and reducing fine lines for a youthful glow. In LushLips Transformation, this targeted therapy revitalizes and plumps the lips, promoting a smoother, healthier appearance.

settings.heading: Near infrared (850nm)
settings.description: Near-infrared light at 830nm penetrates beyond the epidermis and dermis, reaching the hypodermis—the skin’s deepest layer—to stimulate repair, enhance circulation, and reduce inflammation. In LushLips Transformation and MagicMoon Eye Evolution, it restores vitality to the delicate lip and eye area for a firmer, youthful look.

settings.sub-mission: Your morning and nighttime skincare routine
